gist.headline: G-Pai joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: A new student-focused app called G-Pai has sprouted in our community greenhouse. It's still growing, but we love seeing new educational tools bloom!
gist.summary: Added the student-focused app G-Pai to the community showcase and greenhouse.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore G-Pai, a new educational tool built by the community.
gist.visual_concept: A greenhouse setting representing the early-stage app showcase. Polly the bee acting as a student or gardener, nurturing a new educational tool (represented by books and plants).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, watering a glowing code-plant sprouting from a stack of textbooks inside a glass greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
